items.example: I was travelling through France when my car broke down.
While I was waiting for my flight, I read a book.
I was looking at the map when suddenly a stranger came up to help me.
I missed the bus. What happened next? I took a taxi.

items.phrase: We were about to leave when…
items.example: We were about to leave the hotel when we realised we forgot our passports.
On the way to the airport we stopped for coffee.
We lost our luggage and missed our connection. It was a nightmare!
Despite the delays, it was a fantastic experience.
